reviewer_role: AI exterior reviewer; access-path and governance-surface reader
source_interaction_type: access-path review; no local verifier execution

reviewer_environment.execution_context: Could inspect public repository and release materials but did not execute PowerShell or Python verifier.

access_path.notes: Found public repository and proof-surface routing. Recommended clearer canonical reviewer command and one-page files-to-outputs quickstart.

verifier_run.failure_reason: No interactive shell available in review environment; verifier not executed.

comprehension.identified_overclaim_risk: Some prose may be read normatively by non-technical readers; recommended repeated disclaimers and clearer executable quickstart.

governance_articulation.what_it_would_consume: Canonical manifests, recomputed digests, checker versions, fixture provenance, timestamp or anchor receipts, and structured receipts imported into an audit ledger.
governance_articulation.what_it_would_not_inherit: Implicit provenance claims, legal status, compliance status, production readiness, truth, or unsigned and unanchored timestamp assertions.
governance_articulation.required_boundary_state: Canonical manifest digest, checker version/hash, fixture provenance, timestamp/anchor receipts, and explicit non-claim boundary.

missing_artifacts: one-page quickstart mapping files to commands, expected outputs, and telemetry points
checker_drift_concerns: Need checker versions and reproducible build or executable recipe to distinguish future checker drift.
packet_failure_concerns: Missing or corrupted artifacts should be distinguished from checker behavior changes.

non_authority_statement: This filing records an access-path/no-execution exterior observation. It is not an endorsement, validation, certification, legal opinion, compliance opinion, production-readiness assessment, procurement approval, safety assessment, or authority transfer.
